title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 135.505 - Funding period
text:
135.505.  Funding period. — A Missouri certified capital company shall have a funding period of one year from the date of receiving certification from the director.  All investments in the Missouri certified capital company shall be made within such three hundred sixty-five-day funding period.
(L. 1996 H.B. 1237) 
Effective 1-01-97
